batch_character.reason: The batch shifts from affiliate short-form examples to AI workflow, affiliate production, connector, and creative-tone references.

items.visible_story: A daughter returns to a cat after a provocative claim that the mother abandoned it; the cat is shown held close with the subtitle 바로 달려나옴.
items.layout: black headline band, white/green two-color hook, emotional full-bleed animal footage, outlined subtitle, product area placed in lower vacancy
items.hook: family conflict and apparent cruelty create concern before an emotional animal payoff
items.narrative_rule: Do not decide the meaning from the accusation alone; inspect whether the footage resolves it as reunion, attachment, misunderstanding, or another reversal.

commerce_candidates.reason: the cat is the emotional center and the product thumbnail appears cat-themed
valid only if the full video establishes a care need

items.visible_story: An ice-bath butter-making technique with saffron and a reaction that the mixture is setting.
items.layout: large process footage above, live reaction subtitle inside footage, white explanatory lower panel, oversized product cutout overlapping the panel

items.visible_story: A buyer cannot set off after purchasing a very heavy motorcycle, emphasized by the 400 kg subtitle.
items.layout: black title band, single yellow headline, full-height problem footage, high-contrast weight subtitle, product sticker anchored near the motorcycle part

commerce_candidates.candidate: motorcycle support, stand accessory, or maneuvering aid
commerce_candidates.reason: the item should address parking, support, or moving the heavy motorcycle
only retain if its function connects to the demonstrated problem

cross_batch_learning: Narrative resolution has priority over isolated hook polarity when matching products.
Commerce short-form references and project/tool references require separate learning paths.
